name: Mirror
description: Kaleidoscope shards meeting at their hinge — every facet and its reflection re-cut in gem colors per redraw.

code.style: --spin2: @rand(360deg); --rule: ( /* facet and reflection share one emitted color and cut */ --fc: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --cut: polygon(@r(60%, 96%) @r(4%, 28%), 100% 100%, @r(4%, 40%) @r(68%, 96%)); transform: rotate(var(--spin2)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; width: 50%; height: 100%; background: @var(--fc); clip-path: @var(--cut); opacity: 0.9; transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 0; width: 50%; height: 100%; background: @var(--fc); clip-path: @var(--cut); transform: scaleX(-1); opacity: 0.9; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
